case_title: BOHAN, JAMES vs. SOZER, AKAT et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SOZER, AKAT ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SOZER, AKAT
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT SOZER, AKAT
OPPOSITION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. SEPARATE STATEMENT OF DISPUTED FACTS & DECLARATION OF MARTHA MORALES ATTACHED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOHAN, JAMES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT SOZER, AKAT ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

C/C FOR TRIAL. CASE SETTLED AND STATED ON RECORD. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION. LEASE IS FORFEITED. WRIT MAY BE ISSUED, STAYED UNTIL 31-AUG-93. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFT $1,200.00 ON 15-AUG-93. DEFEBDANT TO VACATE PREMISES ON 31-AUG-93. PLAINTIFF PAY DEFENDANT $500.00 PLUS INTEREST FROM JANUARY 1991. MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO REFLECT THE TRUE NAME OF PLAINTIFF AS RAFFIE CHATAZ. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOZER, AKAT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 682 GEARY STREET, STAYED UNTIL SEP-01-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT WILL VACATE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 31-AUG-93; PLTF WAIVE ALL THE CLAIMS FOR RENT DUE; SO LONG DEFT SURRENDERS POSSES- SION, PLTF SHALL RESTORE DEFTS SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $500.00 WITH INTEREST FROM AND AFTER 01-JAN-93; EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR ITS OWN ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS.
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SOZER, AKAT HEARING SET FOR JUL-13-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, CALENDAR OF JUL-13-1993, DENIED TRIABLE ISSUE AS TO WHETHER NOTICE STATES PRECISE SUM DUE. CONFLICT IN THE EVIDENCE BETWEEN DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION PARAGRAPHS 3 & 4 & EXHIBIT 1 VERSUS MORALES DECLARATION PARAGRAPHS 3-5.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SOZER, AKAT

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOHAN, JAMES SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-08-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-14-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOHAN, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT SOZER, AKAT DOES 1 THROUGH 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
